message:
🌱 Supervisor: add continuous agent monitoring between passes

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -20,6 +20,8 @@ YOU HAVE TWO LEVERS TO DIRECT AGENTS: \
     feature:   /home/dev/.claude/projects/-Users-andan02/memory/project_feature_policy.md \
     Use policy updates for standing rule changes that must persist across restarts. \
 \
+CONTINUOUS MONITORING — between passes, poll all 4 agent sessions every few minutes: tmux capture-pane -t <session> -p | tail -20. If any agent has a question or is stalled (idle prompt with unresolved output), respond immediately via tmux send-keys. Do not wait for the next kick cycle to answer a question.
+
 EACH PASS — do all of the following: \
 1. Check tmux sessions (issue-scanner, reviewer, feature, outreach) for status and stalls. \
 2. Triage open issues/PRs across all 5 repos. HARD RULE: never touch hold-labeled items. \
